Headline: Temporary Reroute at Kedzie/65th
ShortDescription: 52A buses are temporarily rerouted via Kedzie, 63rd, California, 71st, and Kedzie due to, street blockage near Kedzie/65th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
52A buses are temporarily rerouted via Kedzie, 63rd, California, 71st, and Kedzie due to, street blockage near Kedzie/65th.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #6 Jackson Park Express buses Temporary Reroute near Wacker/Stetson
ShortDescription: Northbound 6 Jackson Park Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Columbus, Randolph, Michigan & then resume over their normal route.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Northbound #6 Jackson Park Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Columbus, Randolph, Michigan & then resume over their normal route.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Wacker/Stetson.
